title: HVAC Capacity Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool to optimize HVAC system capacity based on load, efficiency, and environmental factors, aligned with ISO 50001 and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Cooling Load
inputs.businessContext: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

inputs.label: Heating Load
inputs.businessContext: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

inputs.label: System Type
inputs.businessContext: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

inputs.label: Relative Humidity
inputs.businessContext: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.

inputs.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
inputs.businessContext: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

inputs.label: Airflow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

inputs.label: Duct Leakage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.

inputs.label: Occupancy Density
inputs.businessContext: People per square meter, impacts internal heat gain (ASHRAE 62.1).

inputs.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

rules.message: Both cooling and heating loads cannot be positive simultaneously for a single zone; check design conditions.
Airflow must be consistent with thermal load; consider minimum ventilation requirements.
Efficiency ratio out of typical range; verify input.
High duct leakage detected; consider sealing to improve effective capacity.

thresholds.message: System capacity is below 90% of load; risk of thermal discomfort and equipment strain.
Efficiency ratio low; consider maintenance or upgrade to reduce energy waste.
Relative humidity outside comfort band; latent capacity may be insufficient.

formulas.name: Total Thermal Load
formulas.description: Sum of cooling and heating loads, adjusted for occupancy and ambient effects.

formulas.name: Effective Airflow
formulas.description: Airflow after accounting for duct leakage.

formulas.name: Sensible Capacity
formulas.description: Capacity to handle sensible heat based on airflow and temperature difference (assuming 12°C delta-T).

formulas.name: Latent Capacity
formulas.description: Capacity to handle moisture removal based on humidity and airflow.

formulas.name: Effective Capacity
formulas.description: Total capacity considering sensible and latent components, adjusted for system type and maintenance.

formulas.name: Capacity Utilization
formulas.description: Ratio of total load to effective capacity, indicating margin.

formulas.name: Energy Performance Index (EPI)
formulas.description: Normalized energy consumption per unit of capacity (ISO 50006).

primary.label: Capacity Utilization
primary.description: Primary metric indicating how much of the system's effective capacity is used. Target < 0.85 for optimal margin.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Duct Leakage Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Capacity lost due to duct leakage, calculated as (airflow_rate - effective_airflow) * 1.2 * 12.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Maintenance Degradation
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Capacity reduction due to lack of preventive maintenance (5% penalty if inactive).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Humidity Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Additional latent load if relative humidity deviates from 50% by more than 10%.

suggestedActions.action: Seal ductwork to reduce leakage below 5%, potentially recovering up to 10% capacity.
Implement preventive maintenance schedule to restore 5% capacity and extend equipment life.
Raise cooling setpoint by 1°C or lower heating setpoint by 1°C to reduce load by 5-10%.
Consider upgrading to high-efficiency equipment (EER > 4.0) to reduce energy consumption by 20%.
Adjust humidification/dehumidification settings to maintain 40-60% RH for comfort and efficiency.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Adjusted confidence based on input completeness and consistency (ISO 5725). Default 85% if all inputs provided, reduced for missing or out-of-range values.
